name: Hot Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, sugar, 6 tablespoons of baking cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Stir in the milk, oil, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Spread the batter into an ungreased 9-inch square baking pan.
3. Combine the brown sugar and remaining cocoa; sprinkle over the batter.
4. Pour hot water over everything. Do not stir.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes. Serve warm. Top with ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
